title: Sorbiss Valley
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Sorbiss Valley''' was located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. During [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]'s reign as ruler, he built a secret [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] in the valley, and berthed the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''Renegade'' there. He used the hangar facilities to heavily modify the ''Renegade'' in preparation for a foray into the Kathol sector to retrieve the [[DarkStryder technology]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], when the planet was [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberated]] by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the location of the corvette and valley was divulged to [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]] by [[Jessa Dajus]]. The ''Renegade'' was commandeered and renamed the ''[[FarStar]]'', and used in the hunt for Moff Sarne.

==Appearances==
